  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>command<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>description<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>BashInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">create_file</h3><a id="user-content-create_file" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: create_file" href="#create_file"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "Create a new file with content in the container. Fails if the path already exists — use str_replace to edit an existing file, or bash_tool (cat &gt; path &lt;&lt; 'EOF') to overwrite it."</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;description&quot;: {&quot;title&quot;: &quot;Why I'm creating this file. ALWAYS PROVIDE THIS PARAMETER FIRST.&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
    &quot;file_text&quot;: {&quot;title&quot;: &quot;Content to write to the file. ALWAYS PROVIDE THIS PARAMETER LAST.&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
    &quot;path&quot;: {&quot;title&quot;: &quot;Path to the file to create. ALWAYS PROVIDE THIS PARAMETER SECOND.&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;description&quot;, &quot;file_text&quot;, &quot;path&quot;],

  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{

ALWAYS PROVIDE THIS PARAMETER SECOND.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">fetch_sports_data</h3><a id="user-content-fetch_sports_data" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: fetch_sports_data" href="#fetch_sports_data"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "Use this tool whenever you need to fetch current, upcoming or recent sports data including scores, standings/rankings, and detailed game stats for the provided sports. If a user is interested in the score of an event or game, and the game is live or recent in last 24hr, fetch both the game scores and game_stats in the same turn (game stats are not available for golf and nascar). For broad queries (e.g. 'latest NBA results'), fetch both scores and standings. Do NOT rely on your memory or assume which players are in a game; fetch both scores, stats, details using the tool. Important: Bias towards fetching score and stats BEFORE responding to the user with workflow: 1) fetch score 2) fetch stats based on game id 3) only then respond to the user. PREFER using this tool over web search for data, scores, stats about recent and upcoming games."</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;data_type&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Type of data to fetch. scores returns recent results, live games, and upcoming games with win probabilities. game_stats requires a game_id from scores results for detailed box score, play-by-play, and player stats.&quot;,
      &quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;scores&quot;, &quot;standings&quot;, &quot;game_stats&quot;],
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;game_id&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;SportRadar game/match ID (required for game_stats). Get this from the id field in scores results.&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;league&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The sports league to query&quot;,
      &quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;nfl&quot;, &quot;nba&quot;, &quot;nhl&quot;, &quot;mlb&quot;, &quot;wnba&quot;, &quot;ncaafb&quot;, &quot;ncaamb&quot;, &quot;ncaawb&quot;, &quot;epl&quot;, &quot;la_liga&quot;, &quot;serie_a&quot;, &quot;bundesliga&quot;, &quot;ligue_1&quot;, &quot;mls&quot;, &quot;champions_league&quot;, &quot;tennis&quot;, &quot;golf&quot;, &quot;nascar&quot;, &quot;cricket&quot;, &quot;mma&quot;],
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;team&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Optional team name to filter scores by a specific team&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;data_type&quot;, &quot;league&quot;],
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"data_type"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Type of data to fetch. scores returns recent results, live games, and upcoming games with win probabilities. game_stats requires a game_id from scores results for detailed box score, play-by-play, and player stats.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>scores<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>standings<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>game_stats<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"game_id"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>SportRadar game/match ID (required for game_stats). Get this from the id field in scores results.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"league"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The sports league to query<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nfl<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nba<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nhl<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>mlb<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>wnba<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ncaafb<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ncaamb<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ncaawb<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>epl<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>la_liga<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>serie_a<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>bundesliga<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ligue_1<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>mls<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>champions_league<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>tennis<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>golf<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nascar<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>cricket<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>mma<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"team"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Optional team name to filter scores by a specific team<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>data_type<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>league<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">image_search</h3><a id="user-content-image_search" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: image_search" href="#image_search"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "Default to using image search for any query where visuals would enhance the user's understanding; skip when the deliverable is primarily textual e.g. for pure text tasks, code, technical support."</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,

      &quot;minimum&quot;: 3,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Max Results&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;

  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;query&quot;],

      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Query<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,

    }

}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">message_compose_v1</h3><a id="user-content-message_compose_v1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: message_compose_v1" href="#message_compose_v1"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "Draft a message (email, Slack, or text) with goal-oriented approaches based on what the user is trying to accomplish. Analyze the situation type (work disagreement, negotiation, following up, delivering bad news, asking for something, setting boundaries, apologizing, declining, giving feedback, cold outreach, responding to feedback, clarifying misunderstanding, delegating, celebrating) and identify competing goals or relationship stakes. <strong>MULTIPLE APPROACHES</strong> (if high-stakes, ambiguous, or competing goals): Start with a scenario summary. Generate 2-3 strategies that lead to different outcomes—not just tones. Label each clearly (e.g., "Disagree and commit" vs "Push for alignment", "Gentle nudge" vs "Create urgency", "Rip the bandaid" vs "Soften the landing"). Note what each prioritizes and trades off. <strong>SINGLE MESSAGE</strong> (if transactional, one clear approach, or user just needs wording help): Just draft it. For emails, include a subject line. Adapt to channel—emails longer/formal, Slack concise, texts brief. Test: Would a user choose between these based on what they want to accomplish?"</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;kind&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The type of message. 'email' shows a subject field and 'Open in Mail' button. 'textMessage' shows 'Open in Messages' button. 'other' shows 'Copy' button for platforms like LinkedIn, Slack, etc.&quot;,
      &quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;email&quot;, &quot;textMessage&quot;, &quot;other&quot;],
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;summary_title&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A brief title that summarizes the message (shown in the share sheet)&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;variants&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Message variants representing different strategic approaches&quot;,
      &quot;items&quot;: {
        &quot;properties&quot;: {
          &quot;body&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;The message content&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
          &quot;label&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;2-4 word goal-oriented label. E.g., 'Apologetic', 'Suggest alternative', 'Hold firm', 'Push back', 'Polite decline', 'Express interest'&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
          &quot;subject&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Email subject line (only used when kind is 'email')&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}
        },
        &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;label&quot;, &quot;body&quot;],
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
      },
      &quot;minItems&quot;: 1,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;kind&quot;, &quot;variants&quot;],
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"kind"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The type of message. 'email' shows a subject field and 'Open in Mail' button.       <span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>email<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>textMessage<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>other<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

    <span class="pl-ent">"summary_title"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A brief title that summarizes the message (shown in the share sheet)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"variants"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Message variants representing different strategic approaches<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"body"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The message content<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
          <span class="pl-ent">"label"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>2-4 word goal-oriented label. E.g., 'Apologetic', 'Suggest alternative', 'Hold firm', 'Push back', 'Polite decline', 'Express interest'<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
          <span class="pl-ent">"subject"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Email subject line (only used when kind is 'email')<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">places_map_display_v0</h3><a id="user-content-places_map_display_v0" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: places_map_display_v0" href="#places_map_display_v0"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Display locations on a map with your recommendations and insider tips.

WORKFLOW:
1. Use places_search tool first to find places and get their place_id
2. Call this tool with place_id references - the backend will fetch full details

CRITICAL: Copy place_id values EXACTLY from places_search tool results. Place IDs are case-sensitive and must be copied verbatim - do not type from memory or modify them.

TWO MODES - use ONE of:

A) SIMPLE MARKERS - just show places on a map:
{
  &quot;locations&quot;: [
    {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Blue Bottle Coffee&quot;,
      &quot;latitude&quot;: 37.78,
      &quot;longitude&quot;: -122.41,
      &quot;place_id&quot;: &quot;ChIJ...&quot;
    }
  ]
}

B) ITINERARY - show a multi-stop trip with timing:
{
  &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Tokyo Day Trip&quot;,
  &quot;narrative&quot;: &quot;A perfect day exploring...&quot;,
  &quot;days&quot;: [
    {
      &quot;day_number&quot;: 1,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Temple Hopping&quot;,
      &quot;locations&quot;: [
        {
          &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Senso-ji Temple&quot;,
          &quot;latitude&quot;: 35.7148,
          &quot;longitude&quot;: 139.7967,
          &quot;place_id&quot;: &quot;ChIJ...&quot;,
          &quot;notes&quot;: &quot;Arrive early to avoid crowds&quot;,
          &quot;arrival_time&quot;: &quot;8:00 AM&quot;,
}
      ]
    }
  ],
  &quot;travel_mode&quot;: &quot;walking&quot;,
  &quot;show_route&quot;: true
}

LOCATION FIELDS:
- name, latitude, longitude (required)
- place_id (recommended - copy EXACTLY from places_search tool, enables full details)
- notes (your tour guide tip)
- arrival_time, duration_minutes (for itineraries)
- address (for custom locations without place_id)"><pre lang="text" class="notranslate"><code>Display locations on a map with your recommendations and insider tips.

WORKFLOW:
1. Use places_search tool first to find places and get their place_id
2. Call this tool with place_id references - the backend will fetch full details

CRITICAL: Copy place_id values EXACTLY from places_search tool results. Place IDs are case-sensitive and must be copied verbatim - do not type from memory or modify them.

TWO MODES - use ONE of:

A) SIMPLE MARKERS - just show places on a map:
{
  "locations": [
    {
      "name": "Blue Bottle Coffee",
      "latitude": 37.78,
      "longitude": -122.41,
      "place_id": "ChIJ..."
    }
  ]
}

B) ITINERARY - show a multi-stop trip with timing:
{
  "title": "Tokyo Day Trip",
  "narrative": "A perfect day exploring...",
  "days": [
    {
      "day_number": 1,
      "title": "Temple Hopping",
      "locations": [
        {
          "name": "Senso-ji Temple",
          "latitude": 35.7148,
          "longitude": 139.7967,
          "place_id": "ChIJ...",
          "notes": "Arrive early to avoid crowds",
          "arrival_time": "8:00 AM",
}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "travel_mode": "walking",
  "show_route": true
}

LOCATION FIELDS:
- name, latitude, longitude (required)
- place_id (recommended - copy EXACTLY from places_search tool, enables full details)
- notes (your tour guide tip)
- arrival_time, duration_minutes (for itineraries)
- address (for custom locations without place_id)
</code></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;$defs&quot;: {
    &quot;DayInput&quot;: {
      &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Single day in an itinerary.&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;day_number&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Day number (1, 2, 3...)&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Day Number&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;},
        &quot;locations&quot;: {
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Stops for this day&quot;,
          &quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/MapLocationInput&quot;},
          &quot;maxItems&quot;: 50,
          &quot;minItems&quot;: 1,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Locations&quot;,
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
        },
        &quot;narrative&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Tour guide story arc for the day&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Narrative&quot;
        },
        &quot;title&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Short evocative title (e.g., 'Temple Hopping')&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Title&quot;
        }
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;day_number&quot;, &quot;locations&quot;],
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;DayInput&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
    },
    &quot;MapLocationInput&quot;: {
      &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Minimal location input from Claude.\n\nOnly name, latitude, and longitude are required. If place_id is provided,\nthe backend will hydrate full place details from the Google Places API.&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;address&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Address for custom locations without place_id&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Address&quot;
        },
        &quot;arrival_time&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Suggested arrival time (e.g., '9:00 AM')&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Arrival Time&quot;
        },
        &quot;duration_minutes&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Suggested time at location in minutes&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Duration Minutes&quot;
        },
        &quot;latitude&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Latitude coordinate&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Latitude&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;},
        &quot;longitude&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Longitude coordinate&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Longitude&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;},
        &quot;name&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Display name of the location&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Name&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
        &quot;notes&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Tour guide tip or insider advice&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Notes&quot;
        },
        &quot;place_id&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Google Place ID. If provided, backend fetches full details.&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Place Id&quot;
        }
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;latitude&quot;, &quot;longitude&quot;, &quot;name&quot;],
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;MapLocationInput&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Input parameters for display_map_tool.\n\nMust provide either `locations` (simple markers) or `days` (itinerary).&quot;,
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;days&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/DayInput&quot;}, &quot;maxItems&quot;: 30, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Itinerary with day structure for multi-day trips&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Days&quot;
    },
    &quot;locations&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/MapLocationInput&quot;}, &quot;maxItems&quot;: 50, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Simple marker display - list of locations without day structure&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Locations&quot;
    },
    &quot;mode&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;markers&quot;, &quot;itinerary&quot;], &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Display mode. Auto-inferred: markers if locations, itinerary if days.&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Mode&quot;
    },
    &quot;narrative&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Tour guide intro for the trip&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Narrative&quot;
    },
    &quot;show_route&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;boolean&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Show route between stops. Default: true for itinerary, false for markers.&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Show Route&quot;
    },
    &quot;title&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Title for the map or itinerary&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Title&quot;
    },
    &quot;travel_mode&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;driving&quot;, &quot;walking&quot;, &quot;transit&quot;, &quot;bicycling&quot;], &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Travel mode for directions (default: driving)&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Travel Mode&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;title&quot;: &quot;DisplayMapParams&quot;,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"$defs"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"DayInput"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Single day in an itinerary.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"day_number"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Day number (1, 2, 3...)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Day Number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"locations"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Stops for this day<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/$defs/MapLocationInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
          <span class="pl-ent">"maxItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"minItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Locations<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"narrative"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Tour guide story arc for the day<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Narrative<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Short evocative title (e.g., 'Temple Hopping')<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Title<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>day_number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>locations<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>DayInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"MapLocationInput"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Minimal location input from Claude.<span class="pl-cce">\n\n</span>Only name, latitude, and longitude are required. If place_id is provided,<span class="pl-cce">\n</span>the backend will hydrate full place details from the Google Places API.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"address"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Address for custom locations without place_id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Address<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"arrival_time"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Suggested arrival time (e.g., '9:00 AM')<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Arrival Time<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"duration_minutes"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Suggested time at location in minutes<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Duration Minutes<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"latitude"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Latitude coordinate<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Latitude<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"longitude"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Longitude coordinate<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Longitude<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Display name of the location<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"notes"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Tour guide tip or insider advice<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Notes<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"place_id"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Google Place ID. If provided, backend fetches full details.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Place Id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>latitude<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>longitude<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>MapLocationInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Input parameters for display_map_tool.<span class="pl-cce">\n\n</span>Must provide either `locations` (simple markers) or `days` (itinerary).<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"days"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/$defs/DayInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, <span class="pl-ent">"maxItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">30</span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Itinerary with day structure for multi-day trips<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Days<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"locations"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/$defs/MapLocationInput<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, <span class="pl-ent">"maxItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50</span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Simple marker display - list of locations without day structure<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Locations<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"mode"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>markers<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>itinerary<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>], <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Display mode. Auto-inferred: markers if locations, itinerary if days.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Mode<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"narrative"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Tour guide intro for the trip<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Narrative<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"show_route"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>boolean<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Show route between stops. Default: true for itinerary, false for markers.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Show Route<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Title for the map or itinerary<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Title<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"travel_mode"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>driving<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>walking<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>transit<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>bicycling<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>], <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Travel mode for directions (default: driving)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Travel Mode<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>DisplayMapParams<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">places_search</h3><a id="user-content-places_search" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: places_search" href="#places_search"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Search for places, businesses, restaurants, and attractions using Google Places.

SUPPORTS MULTIPLE QUERIES in a single call. Multiple queries can be used for:
- efficient itinerary planning
- breaking down broad or abstract requests: 'best hotels 1hr from London' does not translate well to a direct query. Rather it can be decomposed like: 'luxury hotels Oxfordshire', 'luxury hotels Cotswolds', 'luxury hotels North Downs' etc.

USAGE:
{
  &quot;queries&quot;: [
    { &quot;query&quot;: &quot;temples in Asakusa&quot;, &quot;max_results&quot;: 3 },
    { &quot;query&quot;: &quot;ramen restaurants in Tokyo&quot;, &quot;max_results&quot;: 3 },
    { &quot;query&quot;: &quot;coffee shops in Shibuya&quot;, &quot;max_results&quot;: 2 }
  ]
}

Each query can specify max_results (1-10, default 5).
Results are deduplicated across queries.
For place names that are common, make sure you include the wider area e.g. restaurants Chelsea, London (to differentiate vs Chelsea in New York).

RETURNS: Array of places with place_id, name, address, coordinates, rating, photos, hours, and other details. IMPORTANT: Display results to the user via the places_map_display_v0 tool (preferred) or via text. Irrelevant results can be disregarded and ignored, the user will not see them."><pre lang="text" class="notranslate"><code>Search for places, businesses, restaurants, and attractions using Google Places.

SUPPORTS MULTIPLE QUERIES in a single call. Multiple queries can be used for:
- efficient itinerary planning
- breaking down broad or abstract requests: 'best hotels 1hr from London' does not translate well to a direct query. Rather it can be decomposed like: 'luxury hotels Oxfordshire', 'luxury hotels Cotswolds', 'luxury hotels North Downs' etc.

USAGE:
{
  "queries": [
    { "query": "temples in Asakusa", "max_results": 3 },
    { "query": "ramen restaurants in Tokyo", "max_results": 3 },
    { "query": "coffee shops in Shibuya", "max_results": 2 }
  ]
}

Each query can specify max_results (1-10, default 5).
Results are deduplicated across queries.
For place names that are common, make sure you include the wider area e.g. restaurants Chelsea, London (to differentiate vs Chelsea in New York).

RETURNS: Array of places with place_id, name, address, coordinates, rating, photos, hours, and other details. IMPORTANT: Display results to the user via the places_map_display_v0 tool (preferred) or via text. Irrelevant results can be disregarded and ignored, the user will not see them.
</code></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;$defs&quot;: {
    &quot;SearchQuery&quot;: {
      &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Single search query within a multi-query request.&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;max_results&quot;: {
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Maximum number of results for this query (1-10, default 5)&quot;,
          &quot;maximum&quot;: 10,
          &quot;minimum&quot;: 1,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Max Results&quot;,
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
        },
        &quot;query&quot;: {
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Natural language search query (e.g., 'temples in Asakusa', 'ramen restaurants in Tokyo')&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Query&quot;,
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        }
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;query&quot;],
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;SearchQuery&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Input parameters for the places search tool.\n\nSupports multiple queries in a single call for efficient itinerary planning.&quot;,
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;location_bias_lat&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Optional latitude coordinate to bias results toward a specific area&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Location Bias Lat&quot;
    },
    &quot;location_bias_lng&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Optional longitude coordinate to bias results toward a specific area&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Location Bias Lng&quot;
    },
    &quot;location_bias_radius&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Optional radius in meters for location bias (default 5000 if lat/lng provided)&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Location Bias Radius&quot;
    },
    &quot;queries&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;List of search queries (1-10 queries). Each query can specify its own max_results.&quot;,
      &quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/SearchQuery&quot;},
      &quot;maxItems&quot;: 10,
      &quot;minItems&quot;: 1,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Queries&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;queries&quot;],
  &quot;title&quot;: &quot;PlacesSearchParams&quot;,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"$defs"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"SearchQuery"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Single search query within a multi-query request.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"max_results"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Maximum number of results for this query (1-10, default 5)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"maximum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">10</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Max Results<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"query"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Natural language search query (e.g., 'temples in Asakusa', 'ramen restaurants in Tokyo')<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Query<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>query<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>SearchQuery<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Input parameters for the places search tool.<span class="pl-cce">\n\n</span>Supports multiple queries in a single call for efficient itinerary planning.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"location_bias_lat"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Optional latitude coordinate to bias results toward a specific area<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Location Bias Lat<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"location_bias_lng"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Optional longitude coordinate to bias results toward a specific area<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Location Bias Lng<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"location_bias_radius"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Optional radius in meters for location bias (default 5000 if lat/lng provided)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Location Bias Radius<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"queries"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>List of search queries (1-10 queries). Each query can specify its own max_results.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/$defs/SearchQuery<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
      <span class="pl-ent">"maxItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">10</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"minItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Queries<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>queries<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>PlacesSearchParams<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">present_files</h3><a id="user-content-present_files" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: present_files" href="#present_files"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "The present_files tool makes files visible to the user for viewing and rendering in the client interface. When to use the present_files tool: Making any file available for the user to view, download, or interact with; Presenting multiple related files at once; After creating a file that should be presented to the user. When NOT to use the present_files tool: When you only need to read file contents for your own processing; For temporary or intermediate files not meant for user viewing. How it works: Accepts an array of file paths from the container filesystem; Returns output paths where files can be accessed by the client; Output paths are returned in the same order as input file paths; Multiple files can be presented efficiently in a single call; If a file is not in the output directory, it will be automatically copied into that directory; The first input path passed in to the present_files tool, and therefore the first output path returned from it, should correspond to the file that is most relevant for the user to see first"</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;filepaths&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Array of file paths identifying which files to present to the user&quot;,
      &quot;items&quot;: {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
      &quot;minItems&quot;: 1,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Filepaths&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;filepaths&quot;],
  &quot;title&quot;: &quot;PresentFilesInputSchema&quot;,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"filepaths"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Array of file paths identifying which files to present to the user<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
      <span class="pl-ent">"minItems"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Filepaths<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>filepaths<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>PresentFilesInputSchema<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">recipe_display_v0</h3><a id="user-content-recipe_display_v0" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: recipe_display_v0" href="#recipe_display_v0"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Description: "Display an interactive recipe with adjustable servings. Use when the user asks for a recipe, cooking instructions, or food preparation guide. The widget allows users to scale all ingredient amounts proportionally by adjusting the servings control."</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;$defs&quot;: {
    &quot;RecipeIngredient&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Individual ingredient in a recipe.&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;amount&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;The quantity for base_servings&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Amount&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;number&quot;},
        &quot;id&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;4 character unique identifier number for this ingredient (e.g., '0001', '0002'). Used to reference in steps.&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Id&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
        &quot;name&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Display name of the ingredient. For whole/countable items, fold the counting noun in here (e.g., 'garlic cloves', 'large eggs', 'medium lemon, zested').&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Name&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
        &quot;unit&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;enum&quot;: [&quot;g&quot;, &quot;kg&quot;, &quot;ml&quot;, &quot;l&quot;, &quot;tsp&quot;, &quot;tbsp&quot;, &quot;cup&quot;, &quot;fl_oz&quot;, &quot;oz&quot;, &quot;lb&quot;, &quot;pinch&quot;], &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;default&quot;: null,
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Unit of measurement. Omit for whole/countable items (e.g., 3 garlic cloves, 2 lemons) and put the counting noun in `name` instead. For salt/pepper/seasonings, give a concrete starting amount in tsp rather than a placeholder count. Weight: g, kg, oz, lb. Volume: ml, l, tsp, tbsp, cup, fl_oz.&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Unit&quot;
        }
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;amount&quot;, &quot;id&quot;, &quot;name&quot;],
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;RecipeIngredient&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
    },
    &quot;RecipeStep&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Individual step in a recipe.&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;content&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;The full instruction text. Use {ingredient_id} to insert editable ingredient amounts inline (e.g., 'Whisk together {0001} and {0002}')&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Content&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
        &quot;id&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Unique identifier for this step&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Id&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;},
        &quot;timer_seconds&quot;: {
          &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
          &quot;default&quot;: null,
          &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Timer duration in seconds. Include whenever the step involves waiting, cooking, baking, resting, marinating, chilling, boiling, simmering, or any time-based action. Omit only for active hands-on steps with no waiting.&quot;,
          &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Timer Seconds&quot;
        },
        &quot;title&quot;: {&quot;description&quot;: &quot;Short summary of the step (e.g., 'Boil pasta', 'Make the sauce', 'Rest the dough'). Used as the timer label and step header in cooking mode.&quot;, &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Title&quot;, &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;content&quot;, &quot;id&quot;, &quot;title&quot;],
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;RecipeStep&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: false,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Input parameters for the recipe widget tool.&quot;,
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;base_servings&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of servings this recipe makes at base amounts (default: 4)&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Base Servings&quot;
    },
    &quot;description&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A brief description or tagline for the recipe&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Description&quot;
    },
    &quot;ingredients&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;List of ingredients with amounts&quot;,
      &quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/RecipeIngredient&quot;},
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Ingredients&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
    },
    &quot;notes&quot;: {
      &quot;anyOf&quot;: [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;}, {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;null&quot;}],
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Optional tips, variations, or additional notes about the recipe&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Notes&quot;
    },
    &quot;steps&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Cooking instructions. Reference ingredients using {ingredient_id} syntax.&quot;,
      &quot;items&quot;: {&quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/$defs/RecipeStep&quot;},
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Steps&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;
    },
    &quot;title&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The name of the recipe (e.g., 'Spaghetti alla Carbonara')&quot;,
      &quot;title&quot;: &quot;Title&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;required&quot;: [&quot;ingredients&quot;, &quot;steps&quot;, &quot;title&quot;],
  &quot;title&quot;: &quot;RecipeWidgetParams&quot;,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"$defs"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"RecipeIngredient"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Individual ingredient in a recipe.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"amount"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The quantity for base_servings<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Amount<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>number<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"id"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>4 character unique identifier number for this ingredient (e.g., '0001', '0002'). Used to reference in steps.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Display name of the ingredient. For whole/countable items, fold the counting noun in here (e.g., 'garlic cloves', 'large eggs', 'medium lemon, zested').<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"unit"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"enum"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>g<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>kg<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ml<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>l<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>tsp<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>tbsp<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>cup<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>fl_oz<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>oz<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>lb<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>pinch<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>], <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">null</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Unit of measurement. Omit for whole/countable items (e.g., 3 garlic cloves, 2 lemons) and put the counting noun in `name` instead. For salt/pepper/seasonings, give a concrete starting amount in tsp rather than a placeholder count. Weight: g, kg, oz, lb. Volume: ml, l, tsp, tbsp, cup, fl_oz.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Unit<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        }
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>amount<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>RecipeIngredient<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"RecipeStep"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Individual step in a recipe.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"content"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The full instruction text. Use {ingredient_id} to insert editable ingredient amounts inline (e.g., 'Whisk together {0001} and {0002}')<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"id"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Unique identifier for this step<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
        <span class="pl-ent">"timer_seconds"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
          <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">null</span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Timer duration in seconds. Include whenever the step involves waiting, cooking, baking, resting, marinating, chilling, boiling, simmering, or any time-based action. Omit only for active hands-on steps with no waiting.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
          <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Timer Seconds<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Short summary of the step (e.g., 'Boil pasta', 'Make the sauce', 'Rest the dough'). Used as the timer label and step header in cooking mode.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Title<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"required"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>content<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>id<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>title<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>RecipeStep<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>object<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Input parameters for the recipe widget tool.<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"properties"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"base_servings"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>integer<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>The number of servings this recipe makes at base amounts (default: 4)<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Base Servings<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>A brief description or tagline for the recipe<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Description<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"ingredients"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>List of ingredients with amounts<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"items"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>#/$defs/RecipeIngredient<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>},
      <span class="pl-ent">"title"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Ingredients<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>array<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"notes"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"anyOf"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>string<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}, {<span class="pl-ent">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>null<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}],
